title: Control evidence evaluation
description: Structured output of the evaluate_control_evidence tool. Mirrors the exact contract in prompts/evidence_evaluator_prompt.txt.

sufficiency_rating.description: How well the evidence supports the control.

coverage_assessment.description: A 2 to 4 sentence narrative on what the evidence does and does not demonstrate.

gaps_identified.description: Specific gaps between what the control requires and what the evidence shows.

recommended_additional_evidence.description: Concrete additional evidence that would close the gaps and raise the rating.

framework_mapping.description: The most relevant reference in each framework, or 'No direct mapping'.

soc2.description: The most relevant SOC 2 Trust Services Criteria reference(s) and why.

iso_42001.description: The most relevant ISO/IEC 42001:2023 Annex A control reference(s) and why.

nist_ai_rmf.description: The most relevant NIST AI RMF function and category and why.
